data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate that new bookings utilize the current bound version of the offer. However, the evidence indicates that while new bookings are created using version 3, there is no explicit confirmation of the binding mechanism that ensures this requirement is met. Specifically, the linked use case mentions that bookings created in February use version 2, but does not provide sufficient evidence that the system enforces the use of the current version for new bookings, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of explicit binding of new bookings to the current offer version.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
